per_image_non_shared_src.1: A couple eating breakfast at a sunny kitchen table with a window behind them. They're in t-shirts. A white dog peeks from the bottom, in front of the table, closest to the camera.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: A man and woman are standing, wearing jackets over t-shirts, browsing books in a bookstore.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: A couple eating sandwiches on a park bench. The man in a t-shirt, the woman has a jacket over her t-shirt. A white dog is in front of them.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: A couple saying goodbye at a train station, with the man having his back to the camera, the woman in a jacket over a t-shirt is facing the camera and waving, a train is behind on the left.

per_image_non_shared_edit.1: A couple eats breakfast at a sunny kitchen table, window behind them. Man and woman in t-shirts. A cute white dog peeks from bottom of the frame, in front of the table, closest to the camera.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: A couple browsing books in a bookstore, both wearing jackets over t-shirts, standing.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The couple is on a park bench eating sandwiches, with the man in a t-shirt and the woman in a jacket over her t-shirt, and their white dog in front.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: A couple is at a train station. The man has his back to the camera. The woman, wearing a jacket over a t-shirt, faces the camera and waves. A train is behind them on the left.
